title: Building Update
description: Be ready to craft amazing new blocks with the stonecutter! Terracotta and concrete stairs, slabs and walls, and stairs and glass walls, be ready!
body: Be ready to craft amazing new blocks with the stonecutter! Terracotta and concrete stairs, slabs and walls, and stairs and glass walls, be ready! Use them to improve your buildings and create awesome things, pick the blocks put them in the stonecutter and craft these slabs stairs and walls to improve your buildings!
